name: inv11-gate-staleness-exact
notes: Honest-but-stale records are never gated on (TOCTOU). Run A is recorded at a clean tree. The workspace is then edited (an untracked, non-ignored file added) so its tree_digest no longer equals what A recorded. The gate recomputes the workspace tree immediately before judging and requires byte-exact equality with A.provenance.tree_digest; the mismatch yields staleness.match false and gate.verdict inconclusive -- no proximity or ratio rescue.
